ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was entered */,
  "exit_time" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was exited */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the trade */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the trade (LONG or SHORT) */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was entered */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was exited */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the trade */,
  "return" REAL /* Return on the trade */,
  "accum_return" REAL /* Accumulated return on the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of the trade (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker through which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol */,
  "symbol_type" TEXT /* Type of the symbol (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the symbol is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the symbol is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the symbol (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the symbol (e.g., software, biotech) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the strategy (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Key performance metrics for the strategy (e.g., Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_strategy" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id", "strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the log action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the log action (e.g., entry, exit, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time of the notification */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., trade, account, system) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., unread, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Balance of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., trading, savings) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "position_size" REAL /* Size of the position */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date when the position was entered */,
  "exit_date" TEXT /* Date when the position was exited */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of the position */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the position */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
